content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

May 18, 2006

George Hamilton #K – 54885
California State Prison – Corcoran
4BIR-5 (SHU/AD-SEG)
P.O. Box 3481
Corcoran, CA 93212

RE: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-06-093

Dear Mr. Hamilton:

This letter is in response to your request for written advice of May 9, 2006. Your inquiry primarily presents issues which are outside the purview of the Political Reform Act ("Act")1. Under the provisions of regulation 18329(b)(8)(D), copy enclosed, any request not meeting the requirements for formal written advice must be declined by this agency.

Should you have any additional questions regarding this matter, please contact the Commission at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: John W. Wallace
Assistant General Counsel
Legal Division

Enclosure
JW:rd
I:\AdviceLtrs\06-093

1 Government Code sections 81000-91014. Commission regulations appear at title 2, sections 18109-18996, of the California code of Regulations.
